steps.t: Ingór, son of Vékun can be found in the Keep of Tharrazhâr. Dori has asked you to speak to Ingór, son of Vékun before following the Men Angrún to Óins…
Ingór, son of Vékun can be found in the Keep of Tharrazhâr. Dori has asked you to speak to Ingór, son of Vékun before following the Men Angrún to Óins…
Óinsbridge can be found far to the south-west of Skarháld. You have spoken to Ingór, son of Vékun, and you should now follow the Men Angrún to Óinsbri…
Dori can be found at Óinsbridge. You have arrived at Óinsbridge and should now speak to Dori.
Signs of Nori's expedition might be found at Óinsbridge. Dori has asked you to search Óinsbridge for signs of Nori's expedition.
The abandoned camp-site can be found in Óinsbridge. You have found an abandoned camp-site in Óinsbridge. You should try to determine if this camp-site…
A path of hoof-prints can be found in Óinsbridge. You have discovered a path of hoof-prints leading away from the abandoned camp-site. You should foll…
Bofur can be found at Óinsbridge. The path of hoof-prints has led you to Bofur and his goat. You should talk to Bofur.
A path of hoof-prints can be found on the Men Angrún to the west of Óinsbridge. Bofur has discovered another trail of hoof-prints leading onto the Men…
The raven can be found atop an obelisk along the Men Angrún to the west of Óinsbridge. The path of hoof-prints led down the Men Angrún, but it appears…
Dori can be found at Óinsbridge. You have directed the raven to fly to Dori at Óinsbridge. You should now return to Dori.
